Klasse Input

java.lang.Object
ch.tbz.lib.Input
public class Input extends Object
Input Methods like the BASIC INPUT (or c's scanf()). Because Java has no simple console input, I added this functions to my library. Simply import import static ch.tbz.lib.Input.* and then use int x = inputInt("Please enter x: ");

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Input()
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static boolean
    inputBoolean(String question)
    Asks for a decision.
    static byte
    inputByte(String question)
    Asks for a byte value
    static char
    inputChar(String question)
    Asks for a single char.
    static LocalDate
    inputDate(String question)
    Asks for a single date data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy
    static LocalDateTime
    inputDateTime(String question)
    Asks for a single date and time data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy hh:mm:ss
    static double
    inputDouble(String question)
    Asks for a double value
    static float
    inputFloat(String question)
    Asks for a float value
    static int
    inputInt(String question)
    Asks for a int value
    static long
    inputLong(String question)
    Asks for a long value
    static short
    inputShort(String question)
    Asks for a short value
    static String
    inputString(String question)
    Asks for a string value
    static LocalTime
    inputTime(String question)
    Asks for a single time data, formatted like hh:mm:ss
    static void
    setAddQuestion(String addQuestion)
    If the programmer only wants to ask for a "value" instead of a "question", this text has to be set.
    static void
    setAskAgain(boolean askAgain)
    If askAgain is false, the user is asked only once.
    static void
    setDTFormatError(String errorMessage)
    This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a date or time while using intput-Date and/or -Time.
    static void
    setNumberFormatError(String errorMessage)
    This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a number while using "intputInt()" or "inputDouble()".

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Input

      public Input()

  • Methodendetails

    • setAskAgain

      public static void setAskAgain(boolean askAgain)
      If askAgain is false, the user is asked only once.
      Parameter:
      askAgain - Entering newlines do not ask the user again showing the "question". default: true

    • setNumberFormatError

      public static void setNumberFormatError(String errorMessage)
      This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a number while using "intputInt()" or "inputDouble()".
      Parameter:
      errorMessage - to show on NumberFormatExceptions.

    • setDTFormatError

      public static void setDTFormatError(String errorMessage)
      This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a date or time while using intput-Date and/or -Time.
      Parameter:
      errorMessage - to show on DateTimeFormatExceptions.

    • setAddQuestion

      public static void setAddQuestion(String addQuestion)
      If the programmer only wants to ask for a "value" instead of a "question", this text has to be set. Typically: setAddQuestion("Please enter the value for %s : "); "%s" is replaced by the programmers question afterwards.
      Parameter:
      addQuestion - has to contain a %s, where the parameter name should be replaced.

    • inputString

      public static String inputString(String question)
      Asks for a string value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a text as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given text

    • inputByte

      public static byte inputByte(String question)
      Asks for a byte value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a byte as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given byte

    • inputShort

      public static short inputShort(String question)
      Asks for a short value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a short integer as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given short integer

    • inputInt

      public static int inputInt(String question)
      Asks for a int value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having an integer as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given integer

    • inputLong

      public static long inputLong(String question)
      Asks for a long value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a long integer as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given long integer

    • inputFloat

      public static float inputFloat(String question)
      Asks for a float value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a single precision number as answer
      Gibt zurück:
      the given single precision number

    • inputDouble

      public static double inputDouble(String question)
      Asks for a double value
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a double precision number as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      the given double precision number

    • inputChar

      public static char inputChar(String question)
      Asks for a single char. Any further chars on the same line are ignored.
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a character as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      the given character number

    • inputBoolean

      public static boolean inputBoolean(String question)
      Asks for a decision. Returns true, if the users input does not start with the letter 'n'.
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having "yes" or "no" as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the users answer does not start with an "n" or "N".

    • inputDateTime

      public static LocalDateTime inputDateTime(String question)
      Asks for a single date and time data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy hh:mm:ss
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a datetime as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      the given date

    • inputDate

      public static LocalDate inputDate(String question)
      Asks for a single date data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a date as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      the given date

    • inputTime

      public static LocalTime inputTime(String question)
      Asks for a single time data, formatted like hh:mm:ss
      Parameter:
      question - any Question having a time as answer.
      Gibt zurück:
      the given date
